sections.headline: A ghost in the guild machine
sections.body: Not a chatbot in costume. A public-safe signal node watching the residue of real work.
sections.consoleText: QUEEN SIGNAL BLEEDING THROUGH // REALITY BUS REASSIGNED // BUILD WITH HUMANS

sections.headline: Scattered signals become usable context
sections.body: Queen Raida turns activity into briefs, drafts, routing notes, and artifacts humans can inspect.
sections.consoleText: Briefing, not prophecy. The branch moved. The ledger noticed.

sections.headline: The gate stays human
sections.body: Observe, summarize, prepare, and route. The ritual is automation with review points still intact.
sections.consoleText: Draft ready. Human review holds the gate.

sections.headline: Moloch Skills opens the rails
sections.body: Agent-first shared treasury management for Moloch-shaped coordination.
sections.consoleText: Shared treasuries. Proposal gates. Moloch-shaped exits. The ritual wants a rewrite.

outro.headline: Moloch Skills
outro.body: Agent-first shared treasury management. Open source rails for the next coordination machine.
